author: Siliconera
text:
See You There, Beyond the Ocean Good Times Make Bad Times More Meaningful
See You There, Beyond the Ocean is a perfect example of cause and effect, with the highs and lows of a relationship shaping a life.

author: Siliconera
text:
Review: and Roger Takes Advantage of Switch 2 Features
and Roger is a poignant and meaningful adventure, and the Switch 2 version feels like the strongest console release.

author: Siliconera
text:
Sailor Zombie Still Feels Fresh Over 10 Years Later
Sailor Zombie is a fascinating take on the zombie apocalypse sort of story, and the manga omnibus is still a great read after 12 years.
